scripts.build: node scripts/clean-sites-build.mjs && tsc -b && vite build && node scripts/generate-sw.mjs && node scripts/prepare-sites.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.e2e: npm run build && node scripts/run-e2e.mjs scripts/runtime-audit.mjs scripts/pwa-smoke.mjs scripts/bonus-smoke.mjs
scripts.e2e:visual: npm run build && node scripts/run-e2e.mjs scripts/visual-smoke.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run sites:smoke && npm run audit && node scripts/run-e2e.mjs scripts/runtime-audit.mjs scripts/pwa-smoke.mjs scripts/bonus-smoke.mjs
